name: uprise-production-website
description: Repo-specific workflow guidance for maintaining the Uprise Production company website.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain the Uprise static website, Firebase CMS, and GitHub deploy workflow.
interface.longDescription: Adds repo-specific guidance for the Uprise Production company website: static HTML/CSS/JS pages, Firebase/Firestore CMS fallback, cache-busting deploys, browser verification, and GitHub handoff habits.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me maintain and publish the Uprise Production website.
